final:
// // This module checks if any two of the three inputs are equal
module top_module(
  input A,
  input B,
  input C,
  output reg out
);always @(*) begin
    if (A == B && B == C) begin
      out = 1;
    end else begin
      out = 0;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module checks if any two of the three inputs are equal
